title: Social Media / Messaging App Troubleshooting
description: Troubleshooting steps for WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and other social media or messaging apps not working.

steps.title: Check Internet Connection
steps.instruction: Make sure your internet/Wi-Fi is working. Try opening a website or another app. If network is down, fix that first.

steps.title: Clear Cache & Restart App
steps.instruction:
Close the app completely and reopen it.
On mobile: Go to Settings → Apps → [App Name] → Storage → Clear Cache.
On desktop: Close and reopen the desktop/web version.

steps.title: Update the App
steps.instruction:
Check if an app update is available.
Mobile: Open Play Store / App Store → Search for the app → Tap 'Update' if available.
Desktop: Check the app's settings for updates.

steps.title: Check for Service Outages
steps.instruction: The app's servers might be down. Check https://downdetector.com or the app's official status page to see if others are facing the same issue.

steps.title: Raise Support Ticket
steps.instruction: If the app is still not working after all steps, raise a support ticket with: App name, device type, error message (if any), and steps already tried.
